ModMetaData.name: RimWorld OpenTelemetry Exporter
ModMetaData.author: manuelnagele
ModMetaData.description:
Exports real-time colony telemetry via OpenTelemetry (OTLP/HTTP) to Grafana/Mimir/Loki.
Track colonist mood, health, skills, needs, resource stockpiles, power grids, temperatures, threat points, faction goodwill, and all major game events as metrics and logs.
Requires: OTLP-compatible endpoint (Grafana Agent/Alloy, or direct Mimir+Loki).
See GitHub for companion Grafana dashboard JSON.
